steps.title: Read the prediction from the line
steps.content: The question asks for the predicted body length when the seal is $3$ years old. Locate $x=3$ on the horizontal axis and read the corresponding $y$-value on the line of best fit.

steps.title: Round to the nearest ten
steps.content: At $x=3$, the line of best fit is at about $100$ centimeters, which is already rounded to the nearest $10$ centimeters. The answer is 100.
